    Index

    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    I

    iconoMusica - Variable in class controller.MainController
     
    id - Variable in class model.Seccion
     
    idCombate - Variable in class model.Combate
    el id de la clase combate
    identificarEstado(String) - Method in class dao.MovimientoDAO
     
    idEntrenador - Variable in class model.Entrenador
    el identificador del entrenador
    idMovimiento - Variable in class model.Movimiento
    identificador de cada movimiento
    idObjeto - Variable in class model.Objeto
    identificador de cada objeto
    idPokemon - Variable in class model.Pokemon
    id del Pokemon
    imgBebe - Variable in class controller.CrianzaController
     
    imgFondoPantalla - Variable in class controller.EntrenamientoController
     
    imgFrontalEntrenador - Variable in class model.Entrenador
    para el spray frontal del entrenador
    imgFrontalPokemon - Variable in class model.Pokemon
    el spray de la imagen frontal del pokemon
    imgHembra - Variable in class controller.CrianzaController
     
    imgHuevo - Variable in class controller.CrianzaController
     
    imgMacho - Variable in class controller.CrianzaController
     
    imgMoneda - Variable in class controller.CasinoMonedaController
     
    imgObjeto - Variable in class model.Objeto
    la imagen del objeto
    imgPokemonActual - Variable in class controller.CapturaController
     
    imgPokemonCentral - Variable in class controller.EntrenamientoController
     
    imgPosteriorEntrenador - Variable in class model.Entrenador
    para el spray posterior del entrenador
    imgPosteriorPokemon - Variable in class model.Pokemon
    la imagen del spray del Pokemon por detras
    imgSexo - Variable in class controller.CapturaController
     
    imgSexoPokemon - Variable in class controller.EntrenamientoController
     
    imgShiny - Variable in class controller.EntrenamientoController
     
    imgTipo1Pokemon - Variable in class controller.EntrenamientoController
     
    imgTipo2Pokemon - Variable in class controller.EntrenamientoController
     
    IMovimientoDAO - Interface in dao
     
    indiceActual - Variable in class controller.MainController
     
    infoPokemon - Variable in class controller.EquipoController
     
    inicializarLista() - Method in class controller.MainController
     
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class controller.CapturaController
     
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class controller.CasinoController
     
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class controller.CasinoMonedaController
     
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class controller.CasinoNumeroController
     
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class controller.CasinoRuletaController
     
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class controller.CreditosController
     
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class controller.CrianzaController
    Metodo de inicializacion llamado automaticamente por JavaFX al cargar la vista FXML.
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class controller.EntrenamientoController
     
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class controller.EquipoController
     
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class controller.InventarioController
     
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class controller.LoginController
     
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class controller.MainController
     
    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class controller.SeleccionCombateController
    Metodo que inicializa el controlador al cargar la vista.
    intentosRestantes - Variable in class model.AdivinarNumero
    numeor de intentos maximo 5
    inventario - Variable in class model.Entrenador
    mochila con los objetos del entrenador
    Inventario - Class in model
    Class Inventario
    Inventario() - Constructor for class model.Inventario
     
    InventarioController - Class in controller
     
    InventarioController() - Constructor for class controller.InventarioController
